en.welcome: How can I assist you today?

responses.greeting: Hello! How can I help you?
responses.help_request: Sure, please tell me your issue.
responses.track_ride: You can track your ride in the app.
responses.driver_not_arrived: Your driver hasn’t arrived yet. Please wait or contact support.
responses.cannot_contact_driver: Unable to contact driver. Please try again later.
responses.wrong_pickup_location: You can update pickup location from the app.
responses.wrong_drop_location: You can modify drop location in the app.
responses.ride_started_without_user: This is unusual. Please report to support immediately.
responses.ride_not_started: Please check with your driver or cancel the ride.
responses.cancel_ride: You can cancel your ride from the app.
responses.cancel_by_driver: Driver cancelled your ride. Please rebook.
responses.payment_issue: There is an issue with your payment.
responses.double_payment: We will verify and refund duplicate payments.
responses.wrong_fare_charged: Fare discrepancy noted. We will check it.
responses.payment_method_change: You can change payment method in settings.
responses.refund_status: You can check refund status in app.
responses.refund_not_received: Please contact support for refund delay.
responses.invoice_request: Invoice is available in your ride history.
responses.fare_breakup: Fare details are shown in your trip summary.
responses.driver_misbehavior: We will take strict action against the driver.
responses.rash_driving: Thank you for reporting. We will investigate.
responses.accident_report: Please report accident details to support.
responses.lost_item: You can report lost items in the app.
responses.emergency_sos: Please use SOS feature for emergencies.
responses.account_issue: There is an issue with your account.
responses.login_problem: Please reset your password or try again.
responses.update_profile: You can update your profile in settings.
responses.offer_not_applied: Offer was not applied. Please check terms.
responses.route_issue: We will check the route taken.
responses.long_route_taken: We will review your route concern.
responses.unknown_intent: Sorry, I didn’t understand your request.
responses.fallback: Sorry, I didn’t understand your request.

hi.welcome: मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकता हूँ?

responses.greeting: नमस्ते! मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकता हूँ?
responses.track_ride: आप ऐप में अपनी राइड ट्रैक कर सकते हैं।
responses.driver_not_arrived: ड्राइवर अभी तक नहीं आया है।
responses.driver_late: ड्राइवर देर से आ सकता है।
responses.cannot_contact_driver: ड्राइवर से संपर्क नहीं हो पा रहा है।
responses.ride_started_without_user: यह असामान्य है। कृपया रिपोर्ट करें।
responses.ride_not_started: ड्राइवर से संपर्क करें या राइड कैंसल करें।
responses.cancel_ride: आप ऐप से राइड कैंसल कर सकते हैं।
responses.cancel_by_driver: ड्राइवर ने राइड कैंसल कर दी।
responses.refund_request: रिफंड प्रक्रिया शुरू हो गई है।
responses.refund_not_received: रिफंड नहीं मिला, सपोर्ट से संपर्क करें।
responses.fare_breakup: किराए का विवरण ऐप में देखें।
responses.lost_item: खोई हुई वस्तु की रिपोर्ट करें।

mr.welcome: मी तुम्हाला कशी मदत करू शकतो?

responses.greeting: नमस्कार! मी तुमची कशी मदत करू शकतो?
responses.track_ride: तुम्ही अॅपमध्ये राईड ट्रॅक करू शकता.
responses.ride_started_without_user: हे असामान्य आहे. कृपया रिपोर्ट करा.
responses.ride_not_started: ड्रायव्हरशी संपर्क करा किंवा राईड रद्द करा.
